result: Added a single-sentence preflight note at the end of section 2 (입력 파일) of `docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md:69` stating that wrappers block secret-like values in handoff payloads before any model CLI invocation. Documentation-only change, no other files touched.

artifacts.summary: Added a one-sentence preflight note at the end of section 2 stating that wrappers block secret-like values in handoff payloads before any model CLI invocation.

structured_output.change_summary: Added a concise operational note in docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md (section 2, 입력 파일) stating that the wrapper performs a preflight check on the handoff payload and blocks execution when secret-like values (credentials, API keys, environment variable values) are detected before invoking the model CLI. Documentation-only edit; no schemas, wrappers, ledgers, or other files were touched, and no real or dummy secret-looking values were introduced.
structured_output.self_review: Verified the note is short (one sentence), placed near the validator handoff input description as the constraints request, and contains no secret-looking dummy values. The change is minimal and documentation-only. No web search was used. Allowed target file (docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md) was the only file modified.

log.detail: Inserted a single-sentence preflight note about wrapper-level secret-like value blocking at the end of section 2.
